name: Reduce SignUp Form Height
goal: Reduce the vertical height of the SignUp form container to make it more compact while maintaining the existing visual structure and styling.
summary: The user wants to decrease the height of the SignUp form. The SignUpPage.tsx currently sets a fixed height of 800px on the main container. I will reduce this height to a more compact value (e.g., 600px) and ensure the internal layout adjusts gracefully. I will also check the SignUpForm component to ensure it doesn't have conflicting height constraints.
context_assumptions: The project uses Tailwind CSS for styling.
The 'structure' refers to the layout and visual design, not the code architecture.
A height reduction from 800px to 600px is a reasonable 'little lower' adjustment for a form.

files_to_modify.purpose: Reduce the fixed height of the main container from 800px to 600px to make the form more compact.

constraints: Keep the existing structure and styling classes.
acceptance_criteria: The SignUp form container height is reduced from 800px to 600px.
The form remains centered and visually consistent.
No other layout changes are introduced.
notes: The height change is applied to the main container in SignUpPage.tsx. If the form content overflows, the existing overflow-y-auto class on the form side container will handle scrolling.
